testcase.system-out:
🥒 Cucumber BDD Automation Starting... 📋 Feature : Login Page (2 Scenarios) 🌐 App URL : http://localhost:5173
Scenario: Run 1 - Admin logs into the Admin Portal # src/test/resources/features/login.feature:20 Given I open the EmpowerHR login page # com.cucumberdemo.steps.LoginSteps.i_open_the_empowerhr_login_page() When I select the "Administrator" role # com.cucumberdemo.steps.LoginSteps.i_select_the_role(java.lang.String) And I enter username "admin" and password "admin123" # com.cucumberdemo.steps.LoginSteps.i_enter_username_and_password(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And I click the Sign In button # com.cucumberdemo.steps.LoginSteps.i_click_the_sign_in_button() Then I should see the admin dashboard with "Dashboard" text # com.cucumberdemo.steps.LoginSteps.i_should_see_the_admin_dashboard_with_text(java.lang.String) And the login form should no longer be visible # com.cucumberdemo.steps.LoginSteps.the_login_form_should_no_longer_be_visible() org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchSessionException: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: unable to send message to renderer (Session info: chrome=150.0.7871.125) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', testcase.name: Run 2 - Employee logs into the Employee Portal

When I select the "Employee" role # com.cucumberdemo.steps.LoginSteps.i_select_the_role(java.lang.String) And I enter username "aarav.sharma" and password "emp123" # com.cucumberdemo.steps.LoginSteps.i_enter_username_and_password(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And I click the Sign In button # com.cucumberdemo.steps.LoginSteps.i_click_the_sign_in_button() Then I should see the employee portal # com.cucumberdemo.steps.LoginSteps.i_should_see_the_employee_portal() And the login form should no longer be visible # com.cucumberdemo.steps.LoginSteps.the_login_form_should_no_longer_be_visible() org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchWindowException: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not
